pmc_signals.description: Emergency Stop (*ESP). Safety signal. Active low. Must be held at `1` for normal operation. If `0`, system goes into E-Stop.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0008.4 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Cycle Start (ST). Triggers automatic program run on rising edge (from `0` to `1`).
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0007.2 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Feed Hold (*SP). Program execution feed hold. Active low. Must be held at `1` to run. If set to `0`, axis motion pauses.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0008.5 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Start Lock (STLK). Interlocks cycle start. When set to `1`, program run commands are ignored.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0007.1 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: All-Axis Interlock (*IT). Active low interlock. When set to `0`, all axes movements are decelerated and stopped immediately.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0008.0 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Dry Run (DRN). Enables Dry Run. When `1`, programmed feeds (`F`) are ignored; axes move at manual jog feedrates.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0008.1 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Block Delete / Skip (BDT). Block delete status. When `1`, CNC skips lines of G-code starting with a slash (`/`).
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0008.2 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Single Block (*SBK). Active low. When set to `0`, CNC stops execution after finishing the current block.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0008.3 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: External Reset (ERS). Commands a CNC system reset when set to `1` by the ladder logic.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0008.7 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Mode Select Bit 0 (MD1). Bit 0 of mode selection code. Combine with MD2 and MD4 to command CNC modes.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0043.0 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Mode Select Bit 1 (MD2). Bit 1 of mode selection code.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0043.1 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Mode Select Bit 2 (MD4). Bit 2 of mode selection code (selects Auto, MDI, Edit, Jog, Handle).
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0043.2 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Feedrate Override Bits (*FV0 - *FV7). 8-bit Gray code or binary code defining the feedrate override percentage (0% to 200%).
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0012.0 - G0012.7 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Spindle Override Bits (*OV0 - *OV7). Bits specifying the spindle speed override percentage (typically 50% to 120%).
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0014.0 - G0014.7 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Rapid Traverse Override (*ROV1 - *ROV2). Controls rapid override limits (e.g., F0, 25%, 50%, 100%).
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0096.0 - G0096.3 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Axis 1 Plus Jog (+J1). Manual jog command for the first axis (typically X) in the positive direction.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0100.0 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Axis 1 Minus Jog (-J1). Manual jog command for the first axis in the negative direction.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0100.1 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Axis 2 Plus Jog (+J2). Manual jog command for the second axis (typically Y/Z) in the positive direction.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0102.0 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Axis 2 Minus Jog (-J2). Manual jog command for the second axis in the negative direction.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0102.1 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Auxiliary Function Done (FIN). Completion signal. PMC sets to `1` to tell CNC that the requested M/S/T command is complete.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında G0004.3 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Feed Hold Status Lamp (SPL). Feeds back `1` when the CNC is currently paused in a feed hold state.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0000.4 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Cycle Start Status Lamp (STL). Feeds back `1` when the CNC is currently running a program in auto/MDI mode.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0000.5 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Servo Ready (SA). Feeds back `1` when the servo system power loop is active and servos are ready.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0000.6 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Auto Operation Active (OP). Feeds back `1` when the CNC is currently running a program in auto/MDI mode.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0000.7 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Memory Mode Status (MMEM). Feeds back `1` when the CNC is switched to Memory (Auto) program execution mode.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0003.5 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: MDI Mode Status (MMDI). Feeds back `1` when the CNC is switched to Manual Data Input (MDI) mode.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0003.3 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Edit Mode Status (MEDT). Feeds back `1` when the CNC is switched to program EDIT mode.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0003.6 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Jog Mode Status (MJ). Feeds back `1` when the CNC is switched to Manual Jog mode.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0003.2 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Handle Mode Status (MH). Feeds back `1` when the CNC is switched to Manual Pulse Generator (Handle) mode.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0003.1 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: M-code Strobe (MF). Set to `1` by CNC when an M-code is executed. PMC must execute it, then toggle FIN (G4.3) to clear.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0007.0 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Spindle Function Strobe (SF). Set to `1` by CNC when a spindle speed S-code is commanded. Cleared via FIN.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0007.2 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Tool Function Strobe (TF). Set to `1` by CNC when a tool T-code is commanded. Cleared via FIN.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0007.3 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Spindle Speed Reached (SAR). Spindle feedback. Set to `1` when the physical spindle speed matches the S-code commanded target.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0002.0 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: Spindle Zero Speed (SST). Spindle feedback. Set to `1` when the spindle is completely stopped or below zero-speed threshold.
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0002.2 adresi olarak takip edilir.

pmc_signals.description: CNC Reset Status (RST). Feeds back `1` when the CNC is undergoing reset (emergency stop, manual reset button, etc.).
pmc_signals.ladder_example: PMC Ladder programında F0045.0 adresi olarak takip edilir.
